title: Beef Stroganoff
description: A classic Russian dish made with sautéed beef, mushrooms, and a creamy sauce, served over pilaf.
instructions: Cook pilaf according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, sauté beef strips over medium-high heat until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add meat broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to medium-low and add mustardy; stir to combine.
Simmer for 5-7 minutes or until beef is cooked through.
Stir in sour cream and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until heated through.
Serve beef and sauce over cooked pilaf.
